participants.name: Taylen Green
participants.notes: Only threw at pro day; did not run drills or re-test. Said 'I was not going to do anything but just throw.' Had record-setting combine (4.36 40, 43.5" vertical, 11'2" broad at 6-5 7/8, 227 lbs). Measurements and results were not released by Arkansas.

participants.name: Mike Washington Jr.
participants.notes: Pro day 3-cone (6.91) and shuttle (4.32) reported by Louisiana Sports and confirmed by PFF tracker. Ran 5-10-5, 3-cone, bench press, and positional drills at pro day to supplement combine performance. Did not re-run 40 or re-jump at pro day. Combine: 4.33 40, 39" vert, 10'8" broad at 6-1, 223 lbs. Official measurements not released by Arkansas.

participants.name: Julian Neal
participants.notes: Combine invitee; participated in pro day. Combine: 4.49 40, 40" vert, 11'2" broad, 16 bench, 7.13 cone, 4.20 shuttle at 6-1.5, 203 lbs, 32 3/4" arms, 9 1/2" hands. Pro day specific results not released by Arkansas. Transfer from Fresno State.

participants.name: Cam Ball
participants.notes: Combine invitee; participated in pro day. Pro day specific results not released by Arkansas. Career Razorback: 138 tackles, 12.5 TFL, 3 sacks.

participants.name: Fernando Carmona Jr.
participants.notes: Combine invitee; participated in pro day. Listed at 6'5", 325 lbs per ESPN. Pro day specific results not released by Arkansas. Transfer from San Jose State; 49-game start streak. Played guard at Arkansas.

participants.name: Xavian Sorey Jr.
participants.notes: Combine invitee; participated in pro day. Combine 40: 4.63 per NFL.com video title. Listed at 6-3, 225 per 247Sports. Pro day specific results not released by Arkansas. Transfer from Georgia; team-leading 81 tackles in 2025.

additional_notes: Arkansas held its 2026 Pro Day on Friday, March 13, inside Walker Pavilion at the Fred W. Smith Center in Fayetteville. There were 21 total participants, with scouts from all 32 NFL teams and four CFL franchises in attendance. CRITICAL: Results and measurements from Pro Day were explicitly NOT made available to reporters, per the Whole Hog Sports / Arkansas Democrat-Gazette coverage. The only specific pro day drill numbers that have been publicly reported are for RB Mike Washington Jr.: a 6.91-second 3-cone drill and a 4.32-second short shuttle, as reported by Louisiana Sports and confirmed by PFF's pro day results tracker. QB Taylen Green only threw at pro day and did not re-test any drills (he had record-breaking combine numbers). Washington used the pro day to supplement his combine performance with the 5-10-5 shuttle, 3-cone, bench press, and positional drills — drills he did not do at the combine. All six combine invitees (Green, Washington, Neal, Ball, Carmona, Sorey) participated. The remaining 15 participants (Wooden, Walker, Worth, Young, Smalls, Dix, Whalen, Blake, Sharpe, Jones, Lee, Mulipola, Robinson, Ngo, Bale) did not have their results publicly reported. As results leak through draft databases or team sources in coming weeks, this data should be updated. The position designations 'LS' for long snapper Ashton Ngo is non-standard per the output spec; he is a specialist not covered by the listed NFL positions.
